name: The Prodigal Returns
oracleText:
I — Return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to your hand.
II — Create a Food token and you gain 3 life.
III — Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Creatures you control gain vigilance until end of turn.
flavorText: "This my son was dead, and is alive again; he was lost, and is found." — Luke 15:24
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mana, colors, and mechanics were added, but final tuning remains pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Return of the Prodigal Son" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, The Return of the Prodigal Son
